# O'Brians Pub

> Irish pub in Narbonne, France. World beers, signature cocktails, live sports on big screens, and a friendly atmosphere.

O'Brians Pub is located at 9 Bd Général de Gaulle, 11100 Narbonne, France. It is a chic and relaxed Irish pub offering a wide selection of craft and international beers, signature cocktails, shooters, and wines. The pub screens live sport including Six Nations rugby, Ligue 1, Premier League, Champions League, and Formula 1 on big screens.

## Pages

- [Home](https://obriansnarbonne.com): Welcome page introducing O'Brians Pub and linking to key sections.
- [Drinks Menu](https://obriansnarbonne.com/drinks): Full drinks menu including signature cocktails, classics, beers on tap, wine selection, and shooters. Includes a cocktail roulette feature.
- [Live Sports](https://obriansnarbonne.com/sports): Information on live sport screenings — rugby (Six Nations, RC Narbonne), football (Ligue 1, Champions League), and more.
- [Gallery](https://obriansnarbonne.com/gallery): Photos and videos of the pub atmosphere.
- [Meet the Team](https://obriansnarbonne.com/about): The team behind O'Brians Pub.

## Contact
